| image = [[File:NASAburningbrazil.jpg|120px|Deforestation in Brazil]]
| group1 = [[Deforestation in Africa|Africa]] | list1 = * [[Deforestation in Angola|Angola]] * [[Deforestation in the Democratic Republic of the Congo|DR Congo]] * [[Deforestation in Ethiopia|Ethiopia]] * [[Deforestation in Kenya|Kenya]] * [[Deforestation in Madagascar|Madagascar]] * [[Deforestation in Nigeria|Nigeria]]
| group2 = [[Deforestation in the Americas|Americas]] | list2 = * [[Deforestation of the Amazon Rainforest|Amazon]] * [[Deforestation in Argentina|Argentina]] * [[Deforestation in Brazil|Brazil]] * Canada ([[Deforestation in British Columbia|British Columbia]]) * [[Deforestation in Central America|Central America]] * [[Deforestation in Colombia|Colombia]] * [[Deforestation in Costa Rica|Costa Rica]] * [[Deforestation in Haiti|Haiti]] * [[Geography of Mexico#Environmental conditions|Mexico]] * [[Deforestation in the United States|United States]]
| group3 = [[Deforestation in Asia|Asia]] | list3 = * [[Deforestation in Borneo|Borneo]] * [[Deforestation in Cambodia|Cambodia]] * [[Environmental issues in China#Deforestation|China]] * [[Deforestation in India|India]] * [[Deforestation in Indonesia|Indonesia]] ([[Deforestation in Borneo#Indonesian Borneo|Kalimantan]]) * [[Deforestation in Laos|Laos]] * [[Deforestation in Malaysia|Malaysia]] ([[Deforestation in Borneo#Malaysian Borneo|East Malaysia]]) * [[Deforestation in Mongolia|Mongolia]] * [[Deforestation in Myanmar|Myanmar]] * [[Deforestation in Nepal|Nepal]] * [[Deforestation in the Philippines|Philippines]] * [[Deforestation in Sri Lanka|Sri Lanka]] * [[Deforestation in Taiwan|Taiwan]] * [[Deforestation in Thailand|Thailand]] * [[Deforestation in Vietnam|Vietnam]]
| group4 = [[Deforestation in Europe|Europe]] | list4 = * [[Deforestation during the Roman period|Roman Empire]] * [[Deforestation by region#Russia|Russia]] * [[Deforestation in the United Kingdom|United Kingdom]]
| group5 = [[Deforestation in Oceania|Oceania]] | list5 = * [[Land clearing in Australia|Australia]] ([[Deforestation in Victoria|Victoria]]) * [[Deforestation in New Zealand|New Zealand]] * [[Deforestation in Papua New Guinea|Papua New Guinea]]
